# RetainIQ Workspace Instructions

- Keep the app focused on churn analytics, explainable AI, retention recommendations, and premium SaaS-style presentation.
- Prefer modular utilities under `utils/` and keep Streamlit orchestration in `app.py`.
- Use pastel UI styling, rounded cards, and concise business language throughout the dashboard.
- Save the trained model artifact locally in `models/` and keep generated demo data in `dataset/`.
- Keep validation lightweight and fix only issues directly related to the churn platform.
